tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $92.05 May 29 confirmed (CNBC close, -1.77%; -19% in May worst since 2020); Trump ended Situation Room meeting without final determination; Fars disputes MOU text, demands $12B frozen assets. Stress (45%) + Tail (25%) = 70% continued disruption pricing. Stop-loss: Brent sub-$85 on confirmed de-escalation + mine clearance. Conviction reduced to low-medium as market prices aggressive deal probability; but $12B frozen assets impasse + nuclear dismantlement gap sustain collapse risk.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $92.05 May 29 confirmed (-1.77%, -19% monthly); ASEAN Energy ~125.0 est. (-2.3%); ASEAN Banks ~194.0 est. (+1.6%); iTraxx Asia IG ~166bp (-6bp est.). Trump no final determination; Fars text dispute + $12B frozen assets demand reopen downside risk for deal optimism. Tail 25%. If deal collapses: energy equities rebound from oversold levels, banks sell off. Energy/bank divergence trade viable but conviction reduced.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Hold Pending Deal Outcome
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP ~56.80 est. (-0.5% May 29; PHP strengthening on deal optimism; World Bank Brent avg $86 2026). Trump no final determination + Fars-$12B dispute reopen tail risk. Tail 25% justifies USD Call/PHP Put 61.00 overlay. Nuclear sequencing + Strait sovereignty + $12B frozen assets impasse sustain collapse risk despite MOU framework. Stop-loss: confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance (below 56.00). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Hold Pending Deal Outcome
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR ~16,500 est. (-0.6% May 29; IDR strengthening on deal optimism + lower Brent). Brent $92.05 May 29 - ICP overshoot ~$22/bbl easing further on -19% monthly. Trump no final determination; Fars-$12B dispute + nuclear dismantlement gap reopen tail risk. Tail 25%: collapse drives IDR weaker on Brent spike. Stop-loss: USD/IDR 16,400 (confirmed Hormuz reopening + P&I). Conviction low.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia IG CDS Protection - Hold at 178bp
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG ~166bp (-6bp May 29 est.); ASEAN HY ~528bp (-12bp est.). Deal optimism tightening credit; but Trump no final determination + Fars-$12B dispute + nuclear dismantlement gap sustain collapse tail (25%). Tail: deal collapse drives iTraxx 230-260bp; stress (45%): stabilises 165-200bp. Remove at confirmed MOU signature + mine clearance + spreads below 160bp. Not yet at that level. Conviction medium.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold on Physical Supply Lag
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM $18.81 est. (Platts May 22 carried); TTF €44.50 est. (+1.1% May 29 on deal limbo). Trump no final determination; Fars text dispute delays deal; Ras Laffan restart still not before late Aug 2026; mine-clearing ~6 months delays Qatar LNG resumption regardless of deal outcome. JKM-TTF structural premium intact. Stress target $16-20 JKM; tail $24-28. Stop at confirmed mine clearance + Ras Laffan restart timeline.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: iTraxx Asia IG ~166bp (-6bp May 29 est.) - tightening on deal optimism but Trump no final determination. Window narrowing slowly. Execute any residual private placements now before deal binary resolves. Tail: collapse targets 230-260bp (25%); deal: credit demand surge from deal-related issuance tightens market.

Brent $92.05 May 29 confirmed (-1.77%; -19% monthly); THB ~32.55 est. (-0.5%); Thailand 10Y ~2.08% est. (-6bp); tail 25%. Brent moderating sharply on deal hopes - PTTEP EBITDA normalising. Execute USD H2 prefunding immediately. Window closing: if deal signed, credit demand surges; if collapsed (tail 25%), spreads spike.

iTraxx Asia IG ~166bp (-6bp May 29 est.); USD/SGD ~1.2610 est. (-0.2%); Brent $92.05 May 29 confirmed. Deal optimism tightening spreads - execute revolving-credit extension now: tail (25%) collapse scenario still targets 230bp+; deal signature competing issuance. Full USD hedging: SGD strengthening on deal news reduces hedge cost.

ASEAN HY ~528bp (-12bp May 29 est.); Brent $92.05 confirmed. Deal optimism tightening spreads - window opening for Hyflux restructuring. Desalination power cost easing on Brent $92 vs prior $94+ but still elevated. Advance private-credit and quasi-sovereign restructuring terms now before deal binary resolves. Tail (25%): collapse pushes ASEAN HY to 620-650bp.
